title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A multi-agent system design approach that uses deterministic code and callback mechanisms to avoid LLM calls where unnecessary. The Race Condition system demonstrates how 1,000 agents can run on autopilot using the before_model_callback trick in Google ADK, reserving LLM decisions only for tasks requiring reasoning and routing problems to algorithms like Spine and Sprout.
